productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual White Shoes
description: Structured sneakers from numero uno for the soccer player. Aggressive stitch detailing on the upper, styling the shoe into a sleek silhouette of sport perfection. These disctinctive shoes add an authentic sportswear accent to your ensemble. Wear this with leather jackets or blazers, jeans and a tee or a shirt. This NU pair cuts a dash to downtime dressing, while lending your outfit a relaxed vibe. Upper Synthetic leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing Reinforced overlays on the toe box, rear foot and heel collar for support Central lacing systemwith a padded tongue Mesh fabric lining Outsole reinforced onto the heel for comfort Midsole EVa midsole Outsole TPU outsole with branching grooves Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
